spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Asymmetric bento grid for layout. Question area takes 8 cols, sidebars/prize ladder takes 4 cols on desktop.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid with glowing drop-shadows on active states. Use brackets [ ] around button text for terminal feel.

visual_enhancers.scanlines: Overlay using CSS repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.15), rgba(0,0,0,0.15) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 2px)
visual_enhancers.noise_texture: Use background image with low opacity blend mode to add grain.
visual_enhancers.crt_glow: Text-shadow for primary colors (e.g., text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(255, 176, 0, 0.5))
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Avoid heavy glass; use dark transparent backgrounds with sharp 1px borders (Retro-Futurism Surface Strategy).

components.button: Flat dark background, 1px neon border (cyan or amber), text color matches border. Hover: invert colors or add intense glow. Add data-testid to all.
components.prize_ladder: Styled as a system log or hex dump. Highlight current tier with > indicator and bright color. Passed tiers dimmed.
components.lifelines_panel: Row of 3 buttons. When used, show crossed out / glitch effect (opacity-50 line-through).
components.timer: Linear progress bar at top or neon digital clock, transitions Cyan -> Amber -> Red.
components.modals: Terminal popup style: square corners, hard borders, command-line header (e.g., 'SYSTEM.MILESTONE_REACHED').

micro_interactions.hover: Slight lift, border brightness increase, cursor changes to crosshair or terminal block.
micro_interactions.question_reveal: Text decoding effect (scrambled letters resolving to actual text).
micro_interactions.correct_answer: Flash neon green, play success sound, brief screen shake/glitch.
micro_interactions.wrong_answer: Flash neon red, 'SYSTEM FAILURE' glitch overlay.

noise_texture.description: Dark grain noise texture for base background overlay (opacity 5-10%)

glitch_overlay.description: Glitch texture for milestone celebrations or wrong answer overlays (use with mix-blend-mode)

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for all styling. Configure Unbounded and Fira Code in tailwind.config.js.
Implement the CRT scanline effect using a pseudo-element overlay covering the entire viewport with pointer-events-none.
Prize ladder should be left-aligned text looking like code logs (e.g., '0x0C > RS. 1,000,000').
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='option-A-btn').
Include sound effects via standard HTML5 Audio API for interactions (clicks, timer ticks, correct/wrong).
Do NOT use Inter or standard sans-serif fonts. Keep the layout asymmetric and highly stylized as a hacker terminal.
Use standard Shadcn components but heavily customize their classes to remove Vercel-like curves (rounded-none everywhere, solid borders).
